headline: NSC to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing for the Stock?
summary: Norfolk Southern heads into Q2 results with higher earnings expectations, stronger freight demand and cost cuts, even as revenues are forecast to decline.

headline: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q2 Release
summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
